provider: HKUST 2025/26 BBA in Professional Accounting Major and School Requirements
note: This supplement is cohort-specific to students admitted in 2025-26. It records the seven Major Required codes in the official Major Requirements PDF, the School of Business and Management requirements applicable to BBA students, the optional Accounting Analytics Option, and a dated ACCT 3000-level-or-above catalog snapshot for the open one-course / 3-credit elective rule. The catalog snapshot is not a permanent closed graduation pool and eligibility remains subject to prerequisites, exclusions, approvals, offering and the no-reuse rules. ACCT 3030 is excluded because the official catalog identifies it as Intermediate Financial Accounting for Non-Accounting Majors and excludes ACCT 3010 and ACCT 3020. Option students must complete both ACCT 4710 and ISOM 3400 in addition to the Major, and courses used for the Option may not be reused for the Major elective. The official sources conflict on ACCT 4410: the intake-specific Major Requirements PDF omits it, while the 2025-26 normative pathway lists it as Major Required and reports 25 Major credits instead of the PDF's explicit 22-credit sum. ACCT 4410 is retained with this conflict marked for manual review rather than treating the curriculum as fully closed. ACCT 4980 retains its official variable 1-4 credits while using local credits 0 to avoid assuming an endpoint. Recommended Year and semester values come only from the official 2025-26 normative pathway; the anonymous elective placement is not assigned to individual catalog courses. University Common Core, English and Legal Education requirements are outside this Programme-local coded list, so these rows must not be treated as a graduation-completion decision.
